scope_boundary: synthetic context-record gate behavior and external context-management vocabulary only; no VCM resolver, context compiler, memory-store behavior, certificate-truthfulness checker, model-facing context run, summary-fidelity result, or context-adequacy benchmark is promoted
transition_reason: The repository now has exact source mappings for the merged Virtual Context ABI claim, public schemas for context ABI, context packet, and semantic-page certificate records, a synthetic context admission/adequacy harness with valid and expected-invalid fixtures, finite ABI/certificate proof hooks, and external source notes for RAG, Lost in the Middle, MemGPT, LongBench, and RULER. Those artifacts support the design discipline around admission/adequacy separation, typed page and cell records, stale certificate rejection, conflict blocking, deletion closure, escalation, and mode-confusion prevention, but they do not establish VCM resolver behavior, context compiler behavior, memory-store correctness, certificate truthfulness, summary fidelity, contradiction-rate performance, distractor resistance, model verification bandwidth, or runtime context adequacy.
required_artifacts: VCM resolver trace with admitted, rejected, stale, and conflict-bearing context requests
context compiler or memory-store behavior test with source provenance and taint propagation
context-cell certificate checker with source-binding, authority-ceiling, loss-contract, and permitted-use failures
summary-fidelity and omission-accounting tests for lossy context packets
long-context adequacy benchmark run with distractor and position-sensitivity controls
runtime context transaction replay with deletion closure and snapshot invariants
independent review of source interpretation adequacy
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_context_admission_adequacy.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_notes.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: Virtual Context ABI remains at argument
external context sources are comparison vocabulary only
VCM resolver, context compiler, memory-store behavior, certificate truthfulness, summary fidelity, and long-context adequacy benchmarks are not implemented
downgrade_triggers: claim text interpreted as resolver or model-facing context evidence
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the specific synthetic record-gate behavior that passed, or after resolver traces, context compiler behavior, memory-store correctness, certificate-truthfulness checks, summary-fidelity tests, long-context adequacy benchmarks, and source-interpretation review are recorded with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove deployed VCM behavior
schemas validate record shape rather than resolver semantics
external context literature is not a local reproduction or context adequacy result
no independent context-system or source-interpretation review has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent context-system, benchmark, or source-interpretation audit
non_claims: does not promote Virtual Context ABI above argument
does not prove VCM resolver behavior
does not prove context compiler correctness
does not prove long-context adequacy or model verification bandwidth
